commanderWhiteList_desc: Specify ranges (e.g., 1-5) or comma-separated lists of specific commanders (e.g., 1,3,4,5,9).
warningCommandersNotExist: Warning: The specified commanders do not exist on this account
warningCommandersAllInvalid: Warning: None of the specified commanders exist! Falling back to all available commanders
khanRageMaxUsage: Max Khan rage tools usage (0 = unlimited)
khanRageMaxPerHit: Max Khan rage tools per hit (0 = unlimited)
khanProvocationsPerTarget: Max Khan provocations per target (0 = unlimited)
khanCycleWaitTimeoutMinutes: Max wait after Khan cycle before forced re-check (minutes)
khanRageAllowedIds: Allowed Khan rage IDs (comma separated, empty = all)
khanProvocationLimitReached: Khan provocation limit reached for current target
useSkipsForCargo: Use time skips for cargo ship build & upgrade
useSkipsForMead: Use time skips for mead transfer
useSkipsForFood: Use time skips for food transfer
changePasswordSubtitle: Update your credentials for accessing the EGY-BOT panel.
createNewUserSubtitle: Create a login name and password for friends to use the bot.

secondsTillRestartBotSubtitle: Safety wait time before logging back in and playing if the bot disconnects or stops.
autoReconnectEnabled: Enable auto reconnect when bot stops
confirmKillAllTitle: Stop all active bots on the server?
confirmKillAllDescription: Are you sure you want to stop all active bot sessions for all users? This will disable their state and stop them.
confirmKillUserTitle: Stop all bots for this user?
confirmKillUserDescription: Are you sure you want to stop all active bot sessions for this user?
killAllBotsSuccess: All active bots have been stopped.
killUserBotsSuccess: Active bots for this user have been stopped.

setProxyDesc: Add a private proxy to protect your accounts from bans.
selectRunningBotToSeeLogs: Please choose an active game account to stream live bot logs.
waitingForLogs: Waiting for logs from the bot...
currentPlanDesc: You are currently on the free / trial plan.
perfectForMulti: Perfect for players with multiple accounts
liveLogSubtitle: Monitor live operational logs of all running bots.
proxiesSubtitle: Security proxy connection statuses of accounts.
settingsSubtitle: Configure Telegram notifications and account security.
supportUsSubtitle: If you want to support us financially, use any method below.

hospitalNoHealableWounded: Hospital Care: No healable wounded units (using coins) in
hospitalFinishedHealingTotalStart: Hospital Care: Finished healing. Total healed from all kingdoms:
hospitalNoHealingDone: Hospital Care: Checked all hospitals. No healing was needed.
deleteAccountDisabled: Deleting accounts is disabled. Please contact the administrator.
allowElitekingscrossbowman: Allow Crossbowman of the Elite Guard (Ranged)
emailCannotBeChangedWarning: ⚠️ Game email cannot be changed under any circumstances.
changeGamePasswordSubtitle: Update the password used by the bot to log into your Goodgame Empire game account.
gamePasswordNotDashboardWarning: ⚠️ IMPORTANT WARNING: This is your actual Goodgame Empire game account password, NOT your bot dashboard login password! Make sure it is correct so the bot can log in.
gamePasswordChangedSuccessfully: Game account password has been successfully updated!
pleaseEnterGamePassword: Please enter your game password next to the switch before starting the bot.
helpGuideSubtitle: Configure your EGY BOT and optimize your automation.
passwordHelperText: Must be at least 6 characters if specified
stopAttackingAfterDefeat: Stop the attack after the first defeat
activatePluginDesc: Enable or disable this plugin completely for this account
bypassSkipTypeFilter_desc: Allows using skips that are larger than the remaining target time (e.g., using a 24-hour skip for a 1-hour cooldown) instead of waiting or requiring exact matching skips.
eventDifficulty_desc: Select the difficulty level for event attacks (e.g. Easy, Medium, Hard).
lowValueChests_desc: Allow opening low-value resource chests during events.
recruitBerimondUnits_desc: If enabled, the bot will recruit auxiliary Berimond troops in the barracks and include them in attacks. Otherwise, it will only use troops transferred from the main castle.
allowWoodShields_desc: If enabled, the bot will use standard wood shields (Mantlets) for Berimond attacks.
allowIronShields_desc: If enabled, the bot will use premium iron shields (Iron Mantlets) for Berimond attacks.
allowEventShields_desc: If enabled, the bot will use special event shields for Berimond attacks.
noChests_desc: Prevent the bot from opening any event chests.
useFeather_desc: Allow using fast travel feathers to speed up attack travel times.
useCoin_desc: Allow using coins for troop recruitment and acceleration.
foodTroopsOnly_desc: Only send troops that consume regular food, avoiding mead-consuming units.
troopTypeSettings_desc: Choose allowed troop types. Default priority: mead first, then food. Beef is off unless you enable it.
useFoodTroops_desc: Regular food troops (used after mead troops when both are enabled).
useMeadTroops_desc: Mead troops — default first priority for attacks.
prioritizeFoodOverMead_desc: If enabled, food troops will be used first before mead troops.
meadLevelSettings_desc: Level 0 = weakest mead, 10 = strongest. Default is 10 (allows all levels).
meadMinAttackLevel_desc: Do not attack with mead tiers below this level.
meadMaxAttackLevel_desc: Do not attack with mead tiers above this level. Set 10 to allow all tiers.
scoreShutoff_desc: Stop attacking once the target event score is reached.
useTimeSkips_desc: Enable using time skips to accelerate attacks and event actions.
timeSkipsSettings_desc: All time-skip options in one place: enable skips, allowed durations, and baron tower upgrades.
skipTypes_desc: Choose which skip durations the bot may use.
upgradeTowers_desc: Use time skips to auto-upgrade robber baron towers (requires enough skips).
buyCoins_desc: Automatically purchase coins using aquamarine resources.
buyDecoration_desc: Automatically purchase decorations using event points/aquamarine.
resourceSend_desc: Enable auto-sending of resources to event castles.
upgradeStormForts_desc: Allow upgrading cargo ships and storm structures automatically.
resourceSendStorm_desc: Manage Storm Islands: transfer food, mead, resources, and auto-upgrade cargo ships.
sendResources_desc: Send surplus wood and stone from your castles to the Storm kingdom.
autoUpgradeCargo_desc: Automatically upgrade cargo ships when aquamarine is available.
sendMead_desc: Automatically send mead when it falls below the threshold.
meadThreshold_desc: Minimum mead count in Storm kingdom before triggering transfer (e.g. 50000).
useSkipsForMead_desc: Use time skips to complete mead transfers instantly.
sendFood_desc: Automatically send food when it falls below the threshold.
foodThreshold_desc: Minimum food count in Storm kingdom before triggering transfer (e.g. 50000).
useSkipsForFood_desc: Use time skips to complete food transfers instantly.
sendTroopsOver_desc: Allow transfer of extra troops from main castles to event kingdoms.
minTroopsTransferThreshold_desc: Minimum troop count in event kingdom before triggering transfers.
minTroopsTransferSize_desc: Minimum troop count in a single transfer movement (e.g., prevents sending small batches under 100).
troopCount_desc: Target number of troops to maintain or assign per wave.
buyTools_desc: Allow purchasing attack tools automatically from the shop.
buyAmount_desc: Number of wood shields to purchase in each buying batch when the threshold is reached.
buyThreshold_desc: Trigger a new shield purchase when the number of remaining shields drops below this value.
maxShieldBuyLimit_desc: Maximum total number of shields the bot is allowed to buy per event.
noEventTools_desc: Prevent the bot from using premium event tools.
noEventChests_desc: Prevent the bot from using premium event chests.
wallTools_desc: Number of wall tools to deploy per flank wave.
gateTools_desc: Number of gate tools to deploy per wave.
shieldTools_desc: Number of shields to deploy per flank wave.
maxDailyAttackCount_desc: The maximum number of event or baron attacks the bot can execute per day.
minimumRubiesPerAttack_desc: The minimum ruby balance required to proceed with attacks that cost rubies.
stopAttackingAfterDefeat_desc: Stop attacking targets if a defeat occurs, to prevent troop loss.
feastFoodReduction_desc: Reduce food rate limit threshold for feasting.
minimumFood_desc: Minimum amount of food required in the castle storage before starting a feast.
minimumFoodRate_desc: Minimum food production rate required to activate feasting.
hours_desc: Time in hours before the bot automatically shuts down.
rejectOnShieldShortage: Halt attack if out of shields
rejectOnShieldShortage_desc: If enabled, the bot will refuse to send the attack if the castle has less than 5 shields available, logging a shortage error instead.
useWoodShieldsFallback_desc: If the selected event shields run out, the bot will automatically fall back to using ordinary Wood Shields (ID 620) in the same quantity.
useIronShieldsFallback_desc: If the selected event shields run out, the bot will automatically fall back to using Premium/Iron Shields (ID 635) in the same quantity.
requireLaddersAndRams: Treat ladders & rams as critical (like shields)
beefTroopsWarningDesc: Beef troops are your strongest soldiers and very costly to lose. Make sure you want to use them in this event before enabling this option.
chestsMode_desc: Configure how chests are sent in waves 2 and later. No chests sends only troops. Low/High value prioritizes chests by their boost factor.
deleteConfirmNotificationDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this notification? It will be removed from all recipient user notifications dashboards immediately.
noUnits: No troops or tools available in this castle
completedUpdatesList: Wave-Level Troop Priority: Restructured Custom Waves to allow per-wave troop priority options instead of flank-level.
Chests Sorting System: Added Chests Mode selection for Samurai & Nomads to customize chest ordering or disable them completely.

Attack Settings & Optimizations: Added attack setup configurations, automatic tools placement, optimized wave deployments, and fixed issues with Nomad/Samurai camp attacks and the ATTACK_TOO_MANY_UNITS (attack_max_unit_error) error.
Websocket Log Security: Secured live logs websocket endpoint to verify account ownership, preventing unauthorized log retrieval.
upcomingUpdatesList: Robber Baron Attacks Update: Restructured Robber Baron targeting to prevent hitting the same tower multiple times and added support for targeting further towers.
Smart Tools Recruitment: Automated tool recruiting system to ensure attacks never go toolless.
